creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I'm sorry that I hadn't seen this sooner -- unfortunately, there was a separate effort to create a lua54 port that's been in progress for about two years over in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D14709, and this got committed today.

I appreciate the work you put into this, and do understand that this was nothing personal; the ongoing effort was being coordinated by the maintainer of lang/lua53 and Andrew Gierth, who had introduced Lua flavors and is quite intimate with lua in general.

Please let me know if you have any questions, and I would encourage you to reach out if there's any other ports lua needs we aren't fulfilling.
